title: A Hidden Valley with Flowing Colors

scenes.text: This river glows in vibrant colors during the wet season.
This is Cano Cristales, located in the Sierra de la Macarena, Colombia.
The river's colors are due to a unique aquatic plant called Macarenia clavigera, which thrives under specific conditions.
Witness the stunning hues of the river—like nature's own watercolor.
scenes.label: NATURE'S WATERCOLOR

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Cano Cristales, Sierra de la Macarena - Colombia. Known as the 'River of Five Colors', this stunning waterway is a vibrant spectacle worth experiencing. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
